title: vigna minima f. linealis
intro: Vigna minima f. linealis, also known as the small vetchling or narrow-leafed Vigna minima, is a legume plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its ability to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting kidney function. Vigna minima f. linealis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
